genre_refs: vintage WPA/Art Deco poster style; stylized political portrait
description: A USDOL portrait poster of Donald Trump rendered as a high-contrast monochrome illustration rather than a photograph. The image is a posterized grey and blue-grey vector-style portrait of Trump's head and shoulders against a dark textured background; he wears a dark suit, shirt and tie and faces forward, his hair and facial features defined by flat tonal shapes. Across the bottom, in cream-colored condensed capital lettering on two lines, is the text 'THE PRESIDENT OF THE / AMERICAN WORKER,' with 'AMERICAN WORKER' set larger.
notable_text: THE PRESIDENT OF THE AMERICAN WORKER
